input_context:
Global variable: g_qosEnabled

[Declaration]
```cpp
static bool g_qosEnabled = true;
```

[Written by]
  QosConfig::init: sets from config dictionary at startup
  AdminCommand::disableQos: operator command to temporarily bypass QoS

[Read by]
  IoScheduler::enqueue: skips rate limiting when the flag is false
  StatsReporter::emitQosStats: labels metrics as enabled or disabled
ideal_output: Master switch that enables or disables QoS rate limiting across the scheduler; set from startup config and toggleable at runtime by operator commands.
